use_cases: Landing page hero sections with animated backgrounds
Feature showcase headers for SaaS products
Product page hero sections with interactive grid effects
Portfolio or agency website headers with generative visuals
ai_summary: A generative hero component featuring an animated grid background with customizable cell-based animations including pulse, wave, and random effects, plus mouse-follow glow functionality for interactive visual depth. Configurable via props for rows, cols, spacing, duration, color, and animation types.
